Bandpass.Type: analog hardware filter for acquisition; low-pass for online

TaskDescription: [auditory_oddball] Auditory Multi-class Spatial ERP (AMUSE) paradigm using spatial auditory cues from six speaker locations in azimuth plane. Two-step hex-o-spell like interface for character selection. Subjects mentally count target stimuli from one of six spatial directions. SOA: 175.0ms.
Instructions: Focus attention to one target direction and mentally count the number of appearances
InstitutionAddress: Machine Learning Laboratory, Berlin Institute of Technology, FR6-9, Franklinstraße 28/29, 10587 Berlin, Germany
Description: Auditory BCI speller using spatial cues (AMUSE paradigm) allowing purely auditory communication interface
